title: ODHS FRAUD INVESTIGATIONS - 211info
text: OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES ODHS FRAUD INVESTIGATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Conducts investigations related to allegations of fraud within programs administered by ODHS. Investigations focus on client eligibility issues as well as fraud allegations made against ODHS providers and contractors. Client benefits fraud: Report suspected client fraud related to state benefits (Oregon Health Plan, EBT cards, food, cash or child care benefits) Provider fraud: Report suspected provider fraud related to the Oregon Health Plan, which is Oregon's Medicaid program Employee fraud: Report fraud or waste by an ODHS employee or if suspect them of misusing financial resources or equipment Investigators coordinate with staff at the ODHS Field Offices, county prosecutors, and local, state, and federal law enforcement agencies when necessary. The Coordinator sends a report to the Investigations Unit for review, and substantiated criminal investigations results are thoroughly reviewed for prosecution referral. No information is reported back to the complaining party to preserve the confidentiality and privacy of client information. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 945-5608 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (503) 945-5608 ODHS employee fraud reporting FAX (503) 373-1525 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Reports of client fraud may be filed online or by mail. Mail reports to: Fraud Investigations Unit, PO BOX 14150 Salem, OR 97309. Reports of provider fraud may be filed by online, or by mail to: ODHS Office of Program Integrity, 3406 Cherry Ave NE, 2nd Floor, Salem, OR 97303 To report ODHS Employee Fraud and waste contact the hotline -Use only one method to report complaints to avoid duplication, as all complaints are processed by the Client Fraud Hotline Coordinator -Complaints may be made anonymously -Fraud must be reported in the state where it occurred FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Food Stamps/SNAP Fraud Reporting Medicaid Fraud Reporting TANF Fraud Reporting Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - ODHS DISASTER CASE MANAGEMENT HOTLINE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUTH EXPERIENCING HOMELESSNESS PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ODHS LANGUAGE ACCESS AND ACCOMMODATIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ODHS LOCAL OFFICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE ABUSE REPORTING HOTLINE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON ONE ELIGIBILITY PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - REFUGEE SERVICES SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - CHILDREN'S EXTRAORDINARY NEEDS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES
